name: Solaris Flare Q plus Rayzr 50cm
comment:
Solaris Flare Q Plus Rayzr 50cm: Indoor LED fixtures are combination wash/strobe/blinders with class-leading LED RGBW brightness with greater than 9,500 lumens. Features include instant color mixing and 1200Hz refresh rate for smooth on-camera dimming. 
Q+ technology increases the brightness with virtually no additional fan noise.

Indoor LED fixtures are combination wash/strobe/blinders with class-leading LED RGBW brightness with greater than 9,500 lumens. Features include instant color mixing and 1200Hz refresh rate for smooth on-camera dimming. 
Q+ technology increases the brightness with virtually no additional fan noise.
